textByHash.373bbc257221b7b73ea1d36b79493465e11cdc9e: To be a Kahlith is to abandon all attachment. Both physical and emotional. I have no use for money.
textByHash.9043c18489465e562b618a167dac28b04789159d: Do you wish to serve the balance? You'll need weapons if you do. These, I can provide.
textByHash.dfffd6c221868897d6cc8c179496e6b098be4288: Exactly. For us to serve the balance, we must trade with your people. That is what the money is for.
textByHash.e010245e85d721a2b9c4d8942b8e7004e87dc4d0: While we care not for money, your kind still do. While a Kahlith will do anything for the balance, your kind are not so generous.
textByHash.fa48890c0c202aca28cc14b3d1b484a8177be404: Anyway, would you like to purchase some weapons?
